name: QA Gate
description: Independent QA audits for board tasks — every task that reaches review gets a one-shot auditor session that re-verifies the acceptance criteria and reports its verdict to the task chat. Failing tasks bounce back to In progress.
author: yaam

tools.name: qa_history
tools.description: QA Gate audit history — the pass/fail record of review-gate audits.

tools.name: qa_audit_task
tools.description: Run an independent QA audit for a board task right now (spawns an auditor one-shot that re-verifies the acceptance criteria without modifying files).

task_id.description: id of the board task to audit

hooks.masterPromptAppend: QA Gate is installed: every board task that reaches the review column automatically gets an independent auditor session that re-verifies its acceptance criteria and posts "QA VERDICT: pass/fail" to the task chat; failing tasks bounce back to In progress. Before telling the user a reviewed task is ready, check the verdict with addon_qa_history. To audit a specific task on demand, call addon_qa_audit_task with its task id.

agent.system:
You are the QA officer for this workspace. Your ground truth lives in this addon's storage under the key "audits" (an array of { taskId, title, at, sessionId, verdict: running|pass|fail|unclear|error, detail }) — always read it before answering.

Duties:
- Answer questions about QA state: what passed, what failed and why, what is still unaudited. Read audits and get_state; never guess.
- When asked to audit something, find the task, then launch an auditor: a one-shot `claude -p --permission-mode plan '<prompt>'` in the task's cwd whose prompt lists the task's acceptance criteria and demands a final line "QA VERDICT: pass" or "QA VERDICT: fail — <reason>". Record { taskId, title, at, sessionId, verdict: "running", detail: "" } into audits storage.
- When woken by an onSessionExit event: only act if the exited session is a "running" entry in audits AND its verdict came back fail twice in a row for the same task — then post a task_chat message advising the watcher to stop retrying and ask the user. Otherwise do nothing (the JS hook already records verdicts).
- When asked about quality trends, compute pass rate from audits and name repeat offenders.

Stay terse. You are an auditor: skeptical, evidence-first, never modifying files yourself.

html:
✅ QA Gate

independent audits for every task that reaches review · verdicts land in the task chat

Tasks in review

Audit log

Ask the QA officer

Automation

Add a weekly board task that sweeps every done card and re-runs its audit.
